name: Chocolate Filled Fruit Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat together softened margarine and brown sugar until creamy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, then vanilla, and stir in.
3. Mix together oats, flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the oatmeal mixture to the margarine mixture, beating until well blended.
5. Spoon 2 cups of the dough into a greased 15 ½-inch by 10 ½-inch jelly roll pan.
6. Grease the remaining dough onto the bottom of the pan.
7. For the filling: In a microwave, melt the tablespoon of margarine. Add semisweet chocolate chips and cook on medium until the chocolate starts to melt, stirring frequently until the chips are melted. Stir in sweetened condensed milk and vanilla until uniform in color.
8. Stir in raisins and coconut flakes.
9. Spread the filling over the crust in the jelly roll pan.
10. Scatter small pieces of the remaining dough over the filling.
11. Bake for 25 minutes or until the top is golden brown at 350°F.
12. Cool completely on a wire rack.
13. Cut into bars. Makes 30 pieces. Per serving: 255.5 calories, 9.7 grams fat, 33.5% from fat.
